title: scabrethia scabra subsp. scabra
intro: Scabrethia scabra subsp. scabra, also known as the rough scabthorn or rough scabthorn shrub, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Rutaceae, native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Scabrethia scabra subsp. scabra include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, among others. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include making teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
